docstrings.Command: A Scrapy command to check spider contracts.
docstrings.Command.add_options: Add command-specific options to the argparse parser.
docstrings.Command.run: Execute the contract check using the provided args and opts.
docstrings.Command.run.start: An asynchronous iterator that yields contract requests for a spider.
docstrings.Command.short_desc: A brief description of the command's purpose.
docstrings.Command.syntax: The command line syntax for this command.
docstrings.TextTestResult: A custom test result class for reporting contract check outcomes.
docstrings.TextTestResult.printSummary: Print a summary of the test results using the start and stop timestamps.
